## Summary

- Describe the roadmap or compliance change.

## Linked Issue

- Fixes #

## Compliance Checklist

- [ ] Foundation: repo hygiene, templates, or CI compliance gates
- [ ] Foundation: Firebase deny-by-default or least-privilege defaults reviewed
- [ ] Stage 1: data minimization and consent posture reviewed if user-facing flows changed
- [ ] Stage 2: Sovereign Score or finding classification transparency reviewed if analysis logic changed
- [ ] Stage 3: reporting, admin lockdown, or audit log posture reviewed if privileged flows changed
- [ ] No paid GCP services were created, configured, or called automatically
- [ ] If GCP work is still needed, it is tracked in `agape-sovereign: GCP change request (approval required)`

## Validation

- [ ] Local checks run
- [ ] Checks intentionally skipped and explained below
